scopeOfWork: Vendor Management: onboarding, KYC, blacklist check, performance scoring
RFx Management: create RFI/RFQ/RFP, auto-send, receive responses, evaluate
Contract Management: templates, digital signature, renewal alerts
PO Management: create PO, approval workflow, GRN matching
Dashboard & Reporting: KPI vendor, spend analysis, savings report
Integration: SAP ERP, Active Directory (SSO), email gateway

evaluationCriteria.scoringDetail: Scope coverage >= 90% = full marks, live demo
Response time, uptime SLA, training plan

requiredDocuments.envelope1_qualifications: Company certificates, past project references (min. 3), team CVs
requiredDocuments.envelope2_technical: Technical proposal, architecture diagram, demo environment URL
requiredDocuments.envelope3_commercial: Commercial proposal: license, implementation, support/year breakdown
